Class ClientHandler

java.lang.Object
Server.ClientHandler
public class ClientHandler extends Object
Handles business logic for a single connected client. Receives parsed protocol events from ServerConnection. Controls all protocol communication (broadcasting moves and game over).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ClientHandler(Socket client, GameManager gameManager)
    Creates a new handler for a client connection.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClientHandler

      public ClientHandler(Socket client, GameManager gameManager) throws IOException
      Creates a new handler for a client connection.
      Parameters:
      client - the client socket
      gameManager - the shared game manager instance
      Throws:
      IOException
